spec_match.rationale: Thumbnail strip + main view both animating concurrently — direct use of the feature.

interactive.rationale: Click any thumbnail, both containers animate simultaneously.

edge_cases.rationale: No instrumentation showing both animations completed without cancellation. Rapidly clicking thumbnails should also be tested (does the new scroll cancel the in-flight one within the same container?).

openQuestions.title: Test rapid-click cancellation
openQuestions.detail: Clicking thumbnails fast SHOULD cancel the in-flight scroll on the same container. Showing that explicitly — that the spec only allows concurrent across containers, not within the same one — closes the loop.
